[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "best co op game ive played"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the part when Leo and Vincent fought at the end to the death, and the whole time vincent was an undercover cop"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Addicting"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "frustrating, but super rewarding when you learn the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Map feels unnecessarily large at times, like there's missing enemies or towns or something, but it's also kind of nice getting a break from enemies"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "No ultra wide support, has keyboard ui despite using controller"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "does a good job of fleshing out such an open map"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "great ost"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "visuals"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "gameplay"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "left a hole in me the same way it did when I was 13 years old"}]},

  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},

  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "one of the greatest stories ever told in gaming"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "stayed with me through all these years"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "its just not there"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "developer shunting down within 4 days of launch stating \"it has failed financially, and we lack the funds to continue\""}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []}
]

  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors, horrible lag, crashing, freezing"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"}, {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just arent there"}, {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler)"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking"}, {"aspect": "sieges", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you just lack the ability to control them well"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},

  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the game itself is just that good"}, {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "mods add a whole new level of customization and options"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it runs really well even with mods"}, {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "all of the components to the game ... genuinely gives me such a dopamine hit"}, {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "there are so many tutorials and tips out there if you need them"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "from the characters"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "to the tasks"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "to the visuals you get"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is always expanding"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "adding things like more character development"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a chance for some better in game mechanics - such as being able to save without waiting for the end of the day"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "such a wonderful way to unwind"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "emotional impact and wisdom"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Had I payed the full price of the game, I would probably have been left with a feeling of disappointment"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very nice atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "and music"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "The story is okay"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game is beautiful"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The narratives are so so SO gorgeous"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "each of the characters' story made the most of their time"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "short but (bitter)sweet"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a great purchase this 2025 winter sale"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Solid storytelling"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "really good atmosphere"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "There isn't much gameplay per se"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "A super short game too (2-2.5 hours max)"}, {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "There were a few glitches with Molly and Calvin's stories"}]}
]
